flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Reedley College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Reedley College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($510 → $658).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Reedley College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (4.9k vs 6.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Reedley College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $10.2k).
